{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152540E0C6E5E772239C1A3789"}"},"total":282},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7133720176482255654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书其实很不错，
毕竟制作类小说，我还第一次见到写游戏人生的。
但作者可能没搞清制作类的定位。
导致如果没看你的书名，我差点以为这是普通都市文了。
中间转场的时候有那么一点点的慢，像这种小说需要比较快的转场。
如果非要慢的话，最好是在其中添加一些对于这个东西的讨论。
毕竟大部分看这本小说的人都是冲着游戏人生的噱头来的。
对于其中都市文的内容肯定就不怎么感冒。
所以对游戏人生等动漫的描写可以多一点，不然很难让动漫粉服气。
但总体来说还是很好的。
加油！！！[大笑]","text_exts":[{"e":30,"s":26,"text":"游戏人生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742507409C1A3789%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227133720176482255654%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227127544208675572771%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660948810,"group_id":"7127544208675572771","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"再平凡的小孩，也有一场五彩缤纷的梦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N73Ozaqx6oEabcu3HigHTRw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b197e6d6b61347078589ef2aa80e1d23~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795021&x-signature=zjtMa91ekYWOXBJ3cqMFnBSXCE0%3D","user_id":"93095543556","user_name":"薇点t"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93095543556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1661226698,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7127544208675572771","book_info":{"abstract":"【动漫制作＋日常＋直播】动漫制作员陈洛穿越到了一个科技发达，动漫产业滞后的世界。
兴致勃勃的制作动漫，结果赔了不少钱，还使得室友们都陷入了阴霾。
幸好，系统觉醒！
只要让观众们不断期待陈洛接下来的作品，他就可以收集期待值，只要期待值足够，就可以兑换前世的动漫巨著！
于是，陈洛带领着一个年轻的团队，踏上了制作动漫的道路。
开局一部游戏人生，闯出了名声。
一句“赌上一切，来玩游戏吧。”升华了游戏人生的主旨。
紧接着，【神画】制作组趁热打铁，推出了一部部作品，他们这个小作坊也逐渐迈向了世界舞台……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc81bbe9f4a27e59d7ff24f37635b4fb0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"昕以铭璇","author_id":"","book_id":"7127544208675572771","book_name":"开局制作游戏人生，动漫畅销全球","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#500020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7127587229127574049","read_count":"526","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"177451"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"84","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,直播,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc81bbe9f4a27e59d7ff24f37635b4fb0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434740&x-signature=nr3IfNn9%2BISLyh8dyUINClzIcMw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3298968411839552","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.262986e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152540E0C6E5E772239C1A3789"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读38分钟
